title: How to Know Which Trading Style Is Best for You?
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
You’re a trader, not an investor. It’s important that you understand the difference before choosing an actual trading style. Traders perform their magic over shorter periods of time, sometimes within minutes or hours. Investors are more passive. 

So, which are you? Review the trading styles [from our article](https://tickeron.com/blogs/how-to-know-which-trading-style-is-best-for-you-7130) to see which is the best fit for you.
